identity.title: Fast Enough
identity.styleSentence: A high-energy late-90s futuristic R&B/hip-hop summer jam with bright FM synth leads, funky bassline, bouncy New Jack swing drums, crisp snares, syncopated percussion, and fast melodic hooks, inspired by Sega Genesis and Sonic 1 & 2, at a tempo of around 116 BPM.
identity.vocalStyle: Smooth confident male R&B lead with catchy harmonies, flirty swagger, and danceable hip-hop cadence

lyrics.text:
[Intro - Immediate Hook]
Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
We can do it like nobody
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
Fast enough, we can’t get caught now
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

[Verse 1]
Green light, go, we on a mission
Heart in overdrive, no hesitation
Spin through the night with you
Everything feels brand new

You got me moving at the speed of you
No checkpoints, we don’t save and quit
Just keep running through the city lights
You and me, yeah, we about to win

[Pre-Hook]
Loops and turns, we don’t hit the brakes
Sky so blue, no room for mistakes
If you with me, then we going all the way
No time to waste, it’s our day

[Hook]
Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
We can do it like nobody
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
Fast enough, we can’t get caught now
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

[Post-Hook]
Ring-ring, heart light
Level up all night
Spring bounce, take flight
You and me, we feel right

[Verse 2]
From the block to the boardwalk lights
We shine together, everything’s right
Bounce on springs, we rise so high
Nothing can stop us, we touch the sky

You’re my boost, I’m your invincible
Golden love, yeah, we collect it
Too fast, too smooth, they can’t catch us
You know how we run it

[Bridge - Dance Breakdown]
Dum da da da dum dum
Move like that, don’t slow
Dum da da da dum dum
Baby, let the whole night glow

Level up, level up
We go fast, fast enough
Level up, level up
I could be the one you want

[Final Hook]
Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
We can do it like nobody
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
Fast enough, we can’t get caught now
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

[Outro]
Gotta go fast
With you
New level unlocked

analysis.summary: A high-energy, nostalgic R&B track celebrating a fast-paced, flirtatious relationship filled with playful confidence and a sense of invincibility, inspired by retro gaming and summer nights.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A glowing neon-lit cityscape with two silhouettes sprinting through the streets, their movements leaving trails of light behind them.
A retro arcade cabinet flickering with pixelated graphics, surrounded by a vibrant summer night filled with glowing signs and laughter.
A glowing heart pulsating in the center of a starry night, surrounded by swirling colors and soft, glowing particles.
A shadowy figure standing on top of a skyscraper, surrounded by a halo of light and floating power-ups from a retro video game.
Two people jumping together on a sunny beach, their shadows stretching long into the sky as the sun dips below the horizon.
A ticking clock with glowing red numbers, surrounded by a blur of motion and vibrant, fast-moving shapes.
A pixelated screen displaying 'Level Unlocked' with a glowing progress bar and a retro game character standing triumphantly in the center.
Two people racing through a neon-lit city at night, their silhouettes blurred with motion
A car speeding down a highway, the driver leaning forward with a grin, the passenger laughing beside them
A city skyline at night, with neon signs flickering and the couple walking hand in hand through the glow
A couple standing on a rooftop, arms raised in victory as fireworks explode in the sky behind them
A couple dancing in a dimly lit club, their faces lit by the pulsing lights and the glow of their connection
A couple jumping on a trampoline in a backyard, laughing as they soar into the air
Two players on a retro gaming console, their eyes locked in a fierce but playful match
A couple driving through a summer night, the car's headlights cutting through the darkness as they share a kiss
A bustling city at night, with the couple walking through the streets, their silhouettes framed by the glow of streetlights
A couple standing on a cliff overlooking the ocean, the sky painted in hues of orange and pink as the sun sets
A couple walking through a rain-soaked city, their clothes glistening with water as they laugh and embrace
A couple running through a forest at sunrise, their silhouettes blurred as they race against the rising sun

meaning.story: The song is a celebration of a relationship that moves like a game — fast, unpredictable, and full of high stakes and high rewards. Beneath the playful energy lies a deep sense of connection and the thrill of chasing something bigger than oneself, where the partner becomes both the goal and the fuel for the journey.

sections.name: Intro
sections.interpretation: A call to action that sets the tone of the relationship as a high-stakes, fast-moving game.
sections.keyLine: Are you that somebody? I could be that somebody

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.interpretation: The relationship is portrayed as a mission, driven by passion and urgency.
sections.keyLine: You got me moving at the speed of you

sections.name: Pre-Hook
sections.interpretation: A moment of reflection on the journey they are on together, emphasizing unity and purpose.
sections.keyLine: If you with me, then we going all the way

sections.name: Hook
sections.interpretation: A reiteration of the central theme — the push and pull of a fast-paced, flirtatious connection.
sections.keyLine: Fast enough, we can’t get caught now

sections.name: Post-Hook
sections.interpretation: A playful, upbeat interlude that reinforces the idea of leveling up together.

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.interpretation: An expansion of the relationship’s impact, showing how they elevate each other.
sections.keyLine: You’re my boost, I’m your invincible

sections.name: Bridge
sections.interpretation: A rhythmic, dance-driven moment that emphasizes the energy and chemistry between the two.

sections.name: Final Hook
sections.interpretation: A powerful closing that reiterates the central theme with heightened intensity.
sections.keyLine: Fast enough, we can’t get caught now

You’re my boost, I’m your invincible

dropMap.hint: cuts → blackout/cut-mode moments; risers → supernova build-ups (stemSense activeCut/activeRiser fire these automatically)
